title: lithocarpus costatus var. convexa
intro: Lithocarpus costatus var. convexa, also known as the Taiwan bur oak, is a deciduous tree species native to Taiwan, belonging to the family Fagaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus costatus var. convexa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
